query:
SELECT p.id
FROM pages p
LEFT JOIN chapters c
  ON c.id = $4
WHERE p.id = $1
  AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND (p.course_id = $2 OR p.exam_id = $3)
  AND (
    $4::uuid IS NULL
    OR (
      p.course_id IS NOT NULL
      AND c.id = $4
      AND c.course_id = p.course_id
      AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
    )
  )
 FOR UPDATE OF p
